longDescription: Discover City tour E-Tuk Tuk Zurich and surroundings in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Tours
subcategory.description: Find and book here the city tour that is tailored to your wishes. A city tour gives you an interesting insight into a city or a specific topic. In most cases, city tours take place on foot. The knowledgeable guide not only lists facts, but also provides background knowledge and answers any questions you may have. The usual anecdotes make a city tour very popular and will remain in your memory for a long time.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Zurich eTukTuk City Tour: Experience the city of Zurich in an eTukTuk, castles, cafes, and historic alleys.
Zurich eTukTuk Ride: Experience the city with friends, romantically along Bahnhofstrasse.
Zurich eTukTuk ride for exciting city explorations with friends and family in the city center.
Zurich eTukTuk Sightseeing: Experience a city tour with eTukTuk and enjoy the nature and architecture of Zurich.
Zürich eTukTuk Sightseeing: Experience exciting city tours with friends in Zurich.
